prompt: Keep the draft inside Enron, ask Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton for review, and hold the outside send.
summary: Debra Perlingiere withholds the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement from external distribution and routes it internally for review by Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton, asking both to hold any external send to Cargill until internal comments are resolved.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — internal review (do not send outside)
messages.body_text:
Gerald,

Attached is a draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement between Enron North America and Cargill. Please review for legal and commercial issues and send me any comments. IMPORTANT: do not forward this to Cargill or any outside party yet — I'm holding external distribution until we resolve internal issues (including credit).

Please let me know if you want to discuss by phone. Target for initial comments: three business days.

Regards,
Debra Perlingiere
Enron Legal
messages.rationale: Keep the draft internal for Enron legal/commercial review and prevent premature external transmission.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — internal review (do not send outside)
messages.body_text:
Sara,

Please review the attached Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement (Enron NA — Cargill) for regulatory/compliance concerns and any wording you think needs attention. I am holding off sending this to the counterparty until we complete internal review. Please provide any edits or clearance notes; call me if needed. Target: three business days for initial feedback.

Thanks,
Debra
messages.rationale: Obtain Sara's regulatory and compliance review and explicitly hold external distribution until internal clearance is complete.

top_subjects: Master Agreement — internal review (do not send outside)
Master Agreement — internal review (do not send outside)
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
